connection.offlineAria: A na-eji ndezi ahụ na ọnọdụ enweghị ịntanetị, nke pụtara na naanị gị na-edezi
connection.onlineAria: Ndezi ahụ nọ na ọnọdụ imekọrịta site na {type}, nke pụtara na ị nwere ike ịkekọrịta URL ma dezie ya na ndị ọzọ
connection.switchOfflineAria: Gbanyụọ ndezi imekọrịta ma laghachi na ọnọdụ enweghị ịntanetị
connection.switchWebRTCAria: Gbanwee gaa ndezi imekọrịta site na WebRTC
connection.switchWebSocketAria: Gbanwee gaa ndezi imekọrịta site na WebSocket

share.downloadActiveFileInfo: Downloads only the currently open file
share.collaborationLinkTitle: Kekọrịta akwụkwọ a na ndị ọzọ
share.collaborationLinkTooltip: Mee fork nke akwụkwọ a tupu iji ọrụ a
share.snapshotUrlAria: Kekọrịta ọmụmụ ugbu a na ndezi
share.embedCodeAria: Nweta koodu itinye maka ọmụmụ ugbu a n'ime ndezi
share.externalResourceAria: Jiri URL akwụkwọ mpụga maka ikekọrịta na ndezi
share.githubGistLinkTooltip: Ị ga-ebufe faịlụ a na GitHub Gist tupu iji ọrụ a
share.githubGistLinkAria: Budata ọmụmụ LiaScript site na mbufe gara aga na GitHub Gist
share.dataUriAria: Kekọrịta ọmụmụ ugbu a na LiaScript, na ọdịnaya etinyere n'ime URL
share.fileUrlTooltip: Ọrụ a dị naanị ma ọ bụrụ na ị kekọrịtara akụrụngwa mpụga
share.downloadZip: Budata ọrụ niile dịka faịlụ ZIP
share.githubGistAria: Chekwaa akwụkwọ na GitHub dịka gist
share.githubGistTooltip: Mee fork nke akwụkwọ a tupu iji ọrụ a
share.nostrAria: Kekọrịta ọdịnaya ugbu a na Nostr
share.nostrLinkTooltip: You have to publish this file to Nostr before you can use this functionality
share.nostrLinkAria: Load the LiaScript course from a previous Nostr publication
share.exporterAria: Send the whole project to a LiaScript Exporter to convert it to SCORM, PDF, APK, ...
share.exporterTooltip: Hand the entire project to a local or remote LiaScript Exporter for conversion
share.githubRepoFileTooltip: Open the active file as a LiaScript course from the linked GitHub repository (push your changes first). Only available for GitHub-linked projects.

modal.collaborationBody: Ọ bụrụ na ị kekọrịta njikọ dị n'okpuru, ndezi ahụ ga-emeghe na ọnọdụ imekọrịta. Ịrụ ọrụ na-enweghị ịntanetị kwesịkwara ịdị kwe omume, mana ndị ọrụ niile ejikọrọ ga-arụ ọrụ n'otu ọmụmụ. Ọ bụrụ na ị natara nke a site na njikọ imekọrịta ma chọọ ịmepụta ọmụmụ ọhụrụ kpamkpam n'onwe gị, pịa bọtịnụ "Fork", nke ga-emepụta ụdị ọhụrụ kpamkpam.
modal.externalResourceBody: Jiri URL a kọwaa ọdịnaya maka njikọ nkekọrịta gị tupu oge eruo. N'ọnọdụ a, ndezi ahụ ga-ebu ụzọ nwaa ibudata faịlụ Markdown ma tinye ọdịnaya ya n'ime ndezi. Njikọ a ga-arụ ọrụ naanị ma ọ bụrụ na faịlụ Markdown gị dị site n'ịntanetị.
modal.dataProtocolBody: A na-etinye ọdịnaya ọmụmụ niile n'ime data-URI mgbe a koodu ya na Base64 ma ọ bụ URI. Ebe Base64 nwere ike ida maka ụfọdụ asụsụ, a na-emepụta URL e koodu ya na URI kwa. Otú ọ dị, nke a na-arụ ọrụ naanị maka ọmụmụ dị mkpụmkpụ; ka ọmụmụ na-adị ogologo, ka URI na-adị ogologo. Mgbe ị na-ekekọrịta ndezi gị site n'ozi dịka ọmụmaatụ, lelee mbụ na e nweghị akụkụ ebipụrụ. Ọzọkwa, ihe nchọgharị dị iche iche na-akwado ogologo URL dị iche iche... (Họrọ ụdị nke dị mkpụmkpụ)
modal.snapshotBody: Snapshots bụ URL ndị nwere nkọwa ọmụmụ niile. Otú ọ dị, nke a na-arụ ọrụ naanị maka ọmụmụ dị mkpụmkpụ; ka ọmụmụ na-adị ogologo, ka URL na-adị ogologo. Mgbe ị na-ekekọrịta ndezi gị site n'ozi dịka ọmụmaatụ, lelee mbụ na e nweghị akụkụ ebipụrụ. Ọzọkwa, ihe nchọgharị dị iche iche na-akwado ogologo URL dị iche iche...
modal.embedBody: Detuo koodu HTML a n'ime webụsaịtị gị iji tinye ọmụmụ a dịka ọmụmaatụ. Ị nwekwara ike ịgbanwe URL site na otu n'ime ndị a iji mepee ndezi ma ọ bụ nlele mbụ ozugbo:

prompt.shareFileUrl: biko tinye URL nke faịlụ Markdown ịchọrọ ịkekọrịta

examples.footer: Nke a bụ ndezi imekọrịta n'ịntanetị maka {liascript}. A na-echekwa ọdịnaya niile naanị n'ime ihe nchọgharị gị. Chọọ {templates} a pụrụ itinye ma ọ bụ {courses} ebipụtalarị.

index.footer: Nke a bụ ndezi imekọrịta n'ịntanetị maka {liascript}. A na-echekwa ọdịnaya niile naanị n'ime ihe nchọgharị gị. Ọ bụrụ na ịchọrọ mkpali, lelee ụfọdụ {examples} anyị, chọọ {templates} a pụrụ itinye, ma ọ bụ {courses} ebipụtalarị.

import.heading: Import from
import.title: Create a new project
import.newDesc: Start with a blank document and write from scratch.
import.uploadDesc: Pick a Markdown file or a ZIP archive from your device.
import.githubDesc: Import the files of a public GitHub repository.
import.urlDesc: Load a Markdown file or ZIP archive from a web link.
import.gistDesc: Import all files of a GitHub Gist into a new project.
import.localFolderDesc: Open a folder on your computer (Chrome / Edge only).
import.githubHint: Pick the files to import on the next screen.
import.urlHint: Loads a Markdown file or a ZIP archive into a new project.
import.gistHint: Imports all files of the gist into a new project.

errors.generic: Import failed. Please check your input and try again.
errors.invalidRepo: Could not recognise a GitHub repository in that input.
errors.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid http(s) URL.
errors.invalidGist: Could not find a gist for that ID.
errors.fetchFailed: Could not load the resource. Check the URL and your connection.

card.deleteConfirm: Ị ji n'aka na ịchọrọ ihichapụ akwụkwọ a ruo mgbe ebighị ebi?

toast.compileHint: Ị nwere ike ịgbanwe ma kompaili ọmụmụ a site na {ctrl}, mana ọ bụrụ na ịchọrọ ịchekwa mgbanwe gị ruo mgbe ebighị ebi, ị ga-eme fork!
toast.compileHintEmbed: Ị nwere ike ịgbanwe ma kompaili ọmụmụ a site na {ctrl}, ma ọ bụ mepee ya na {link}.
toast.compileHintEmbedOnly: Ị nwere ike ịgbanwe ma kompaili ọmụmụ a site na {ctrl}
toast.openInEditor: ... ma ọ bụ mepee ya na {link} ...
toast.viewOnLiaScript: Ọ bụrụ na ịchọrọ ịhụ ọmụmụ ahụ na LiaScript, pịa {here}.
toast.toolbarHint: Jiri ogwe ngwaọrụ gbanwee n'etiti ọnọdụ ndezi na nlele mbụ.

github.badCredentials: Nkwenye abụghị eziokwu, ibe na-ebudata ọzọ

menu.importTooltip: Import files from a GitHub repository
menu.pushTooltip: Commit and push changes to the linked repository
menu.pullTooltip: Fetch changes from the linked repository
menu.publishTooltip: Create a new GitHub repository and push all project files

import.title: Import from GitHub
import.repoHint: Public repositories can be imported without a token.
import.truncated: This repository is very large; the file list was truncated by GitHub.
import.emptyRepo: This repository is empty. An empty README.md will be created to start your project.

push.title: Push to GitHub
push.remoteDrift: The repository changed on GitHub since your last sync. Consider pulling first; unchanged remote files are preserved.

pull.title: Pull from GitHub
pull.upToDate: Your project is up to date with GitHub.

pat.intro: Add a Personal Access Token (PAT) to raise the rate limit and to access private repositories or push changes.
pat.howtoToggle: How do I create a token?
pat.step2: Choose a name and an expiration, then select the repositories you want to use.
pat.step3Write: Under "Repository permissions" set "Contents" to "Read and write".
pat.step2Classic: Make sure the "repo" scope is checked (creating a repository needs a classic token — fine-grained tokens cannot do this).
pat.step3Classic: Choose a name and an expiration.
pat.step4: Generate the token, copy it and paste it below.

errors.badUrl: Please enter a valid repository (owner/repo or a GitHub URL).
errors.notFound: Repository, branch or file not found.
errors.network: Could not reach GitHub. Please check your connection.

publish.title: Publish to a new repository
publish.intro: Create a new GitHub repository and push all project files into it.

nostr.title: Kekọrịta site na Nostr
nostr.publicKeyHint: A na-eji igodo ọha gị mata gị na netwọkụ Nostr.
nostr.privateKeyHint: A chọrọ igodo nzuzo gị iji bịanye aka ma bipụta ozi. Chekwaa ya nke ọma.
nostr.storeCredentials: Chekwaa nkwenye n'ime ihe nchọgharị a
nostr.storeCredentialsWarning: Ịchekwa igodo nzuzo gị n'ime ihe nchọgharị dị mfe, mana ọ bụghị nke kachasị nchebe.
nostr.relayHint: Tinye sava relay (otu kwa ahịrị) ebe a ga-ebipụta ọdịnaya gị.
nostr.rememberRelays: Cheta relay ndị a maka mbipụta n'ọdịnihu
nostr.saveKeyWarningTitle: Dị mkpa: chekwaa igodo nzuzo gị
nostr.saveKeyWarningBody: Igodo nzuzo a na-enye ohere ịbanye na njirimara Nostr gị. Chekwaa ya nke ọma.
nostr.intro: Kekọrịta ọmụmụ gị na obodo Nostr. Ị nwere ike ibipụta ozugbo ma ọ bụ hazie ozi gị mbụ.
nostr.embedMedia: Tinye faịlụ mgbasa ozi dịka data URI
nostr.embedMediaHint: Na-agbanwe onyonyo, ọdịyo na vidiyo gaa data URI etinyere maka ibugharị ka mma.
nostr.messagePlaceholder: Tinye ozi iji soro mbipụta Nostr gị...
nostr.alertGenerateFailed: Enweghị ike ịmepụta di igodo. Biko nwaa ọzọ.
nostr.alertMissingKeys: Biko tinye igodo ọha na igodo nzuzo gị tupu ibipụta.
nostr.alertMissingRelay: Biko tinye opekata mpe otu sava relay.
nostr.alertPublishFailed: Ịbipụta na netwọkụ Nostr dara. Biko nwaa ọzọ.
nostr.alertMissingPrivateKey: Biko nye igodo nzuzo gị iji bịanye aka ma bipụta ozi.
nostr.alertProcessingError: Njehie mgbe a na-ahazi data akwụkwọ.

toolbar.noPreview: Enweghị nlele mbụ maka ụdị faịlụ a.

exporter.title: LiaScript Exporter
exporter.urlHint: Start the exporter locally with 'liaex serve', or enter the address of a hosted exporter. The project is sent to this server and converted there.
exporter.resendTitle: Send the current project to the exporter again
exporter.handed: Project handed to the exporter. Choose a format/preset below and start the export.
exporter.errorInvalidUrl: Invalid URL. Please enter a full address, e.g. http://localhost:3000
exporter.errorMixedContent: This editor runs over HTTPS and cannot embed an insecure HTTP exporter (except localhost). Please use an HTTPS exporter URL.
exporter.errorNoHandshake: Could not reach the exporter. Make sure it is running ('liaex serve') and reachable at this URL, and that it allows being embedded.
exporter.errorNoProject: No active project found to export.
exporter.errorSend: Failed to package and send the project.

menu.openTooltip: Link a folder on your computer to this project
menu.syncTooltip: Compare and sync this project with the linked folder

sync.title: Synchronize with local folder
sync.inSync: Editor and folder are already in sync.

errors.noFolder: No folder is linked to this project yet.
errors.permission: Access to the folder was denied. Please grant permission to continue.
